text:
# Date Event

April 2026 I separated from John Doe.
April 2026 Emma Doe continues to live with me in London.
April–May John Doe had informal alternate weekend contact.
2026
May 2026 Mediation took place but no agreement was reached.
10 May I applied for a Child Arrangements Order.
2026
25 May John Doe filed a response to the application.
2026
16 June First Hearing Dispute Resolution Appointment took place.
2026

metadata.source: Guide for Litigants in Person: Preparing Court Bundles (March 2026)
